tools.name: list_endpoints
tools.description: List all paid endpoints exposed by this MCP server with their prices and live status. Free — no wallet required. Use this first to discover what tools are available.

tools.name: pricing_info
tools.description: Return pricing details for the GoCreative Agent API — base price per call, premium endpoints, cache TTLs, and supported payment networks. Free.

tools.name: wallet_helper
tools.description: Return step-by-step instructions for setting up x402 USDC autopay for this MCP server. Use this if a paid tool returned a 402 error or you're onboarding a new agent that needs to pay for API calls. Free.

tools.name: install_snippets
tools.description: Return ready-to-paste configuration snippets for installing this MCP server in Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue.dev, Windsurf, and Zed. Free.

tools.name: usage_stats
tools.description: Return summary stats of how this MCP server has been used (top tools called, success rate, recent activity). Free. Use to verify your own integration is hitting the right tools.
